name: Rainbow Blossom's East Indian Spring
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook barley in water until tender, about 1 hour and 15 minutes.
2. Drain and chill the cooked barley.
3. In a large bowl, whisk together all dressing ingredients with a fork. Refrigerate.
4. In a large bowl, measure out 3 cups of the chilled barley.
5. Add snow peas, peanuts, raisins, coconut, diced carrot, red pepper, scallion, and tomato to the barley mixture.
6. Add the prepared dressing and toss well.
7. Chill until ready to serve.
